commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=408d00a7adfafe35adec02c0fd2ce9076c3baf1e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces iMessage opt-in catchup with always-on inbound dedupe, local `since_rowid` downtime recovery, stale-backlog age fencing, doctor/config cleanup, docs, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source -710, Tests -1195, Docs -43, Generated 0. Total -1948 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main suppresses only rows at or below the startup watermark and has no iMessage inbound replay guard, so old-date rows written above that boundary can reach dispatch; the PR body and tests exercise the intended suppression and downtime replay paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the stale exported `catchup` type, but maintainers still need to accept the shipped catchup and remote recovery compatibility decision before merge.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
